updateNote: Day 65 5:02 PM PT refresh — Trump announces 'Project Freedom' — US Navy to escort ~2,000 stranded ships through Strait of Hormuz starting Monday May 5. CENTCOM: destroyers, 100+ aircraft, 15,000 service members. Trump rejects Iran 14-point plan: 'not paid big enough price.' Iran reviews US counter-response via Pakistan. Rubio: 'Nuclear question is the reason we're in this.' Iranian supertanker HUGE (1.9M bbl, $220M) bypasses US blockade via Malacca Strait. Rezaee threatens 'graveyard' of US warships. IDF destroys 80m Hezbollah tunnel. Hezbollah claims 25 rocket/drone attacks. Lebanon DT 2,679 killed / 8,229 wounded. Brent $108.17 (+35.5%), WTI $101.94 (+35.0%). Gas $4.446 (+42.0%). Hormuz Day 62.
